edges.child_node: "Nationwide in Indonesia, but more specific to Java"

Id1.text: Arem-arem is a food found nationwide in Indonesia, but is more specific to Java. Jusuf Kalla is the leader of Indonesia.

Id2.text: Jusuf Kalla is the leader of Indonesia, the country which serves Arem-arem. While Arem-arem is nationwide in Indonesia, it is more specific to Java.

Id3.text: Jusuf Kalla is a leader in Indonesia, where the dish arem-arem is found nationwide, though it is more specific to Java.
